items.title: Korean won stablecoin KRWQ expands to Solana following March EDX Markets listing
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of KRWQ on Solana enhances liquidity options and may attract more users to the ecosystem, boosting overall transaction volume.

items.title: Jupiter whales buy 10.32 mln tokens – Can JUP bulls reclaim $0.265 next?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Increased whale activity in JUP could signal growing confidence in the token, potentially driving demand and influencing market dynamics for Solana-based applications.

items.title: JPMorgan taps both Ethereum and Solana for separate reasons for its institutional cash stack
items.whyYouShouldCare: JPMorgan's interest in both Ethereum and Solana highlights the bank's recognition of Solana's institutional appeal, which may enhance its credibility and usage in financial markets.
